title: encyclia cochleata var. triandra
intro: Encyclia cochleata var. triandra is a type of orchid, specifically a variant of the Encyclia cochleata species, known for its unique, funnel-shaped flowers. Traditionally, Encyclia cochleata var. triandra has been used in folk medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Encyclia cochleata var. triandra is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
